body.title: feat: register SIGTERM/SIGINT handlers for clean terminal restore
body.result: Added signal.signal(SIGINT, lambda *_: sys.exit(130)) alongside existing SIGTERM handler in main.py:8112. Ensures atexit handlers (readline, Rich) run on Ctrl-C regardless of which thread receives the signal. 567 tests pass.
body.description: Igor has no signal handlers. On SIGTERM/SIGINT, readline and Rich console are not cleaned up — terminal is left in degraded state (missed keypresses, slow input). Fix: register signal.signal(SIGTERM/SIGINT) in main.py startup that calls readline cleanup, console flush, and sys.exit(0). This is a Phase D self-coding exercise for Igor — small, self-contained, LOW inertia target (main.py signal registration section). Productization prereq.
